reviews.review_description:
Awesome Asteroids is a superb indie space game where you complete varied missions like destroying waves of enemies or protecting key structures. I really like the mission-based format because it gives a clear sense of progression and keeps the action fresh.

There are multiple camera views for your spaceship, plus different weapons and power-ups to experiment with, which adds nice variety and replayability. Overall, it’s a fun, engaging, and well-executed space shooter—perfect for casual VR sessions. Highly recommended! ⭐️
When you just want to have a Quick Game shooting Asteroids and enemy ships on the Go Recommend this game it's fast enjoyable and controls are  intuitive very well made from the Ground up
